title: #amytangerine | Embroidery Stencils

body: On Instagram, you can hashtag your photos, which I think is an awesome thing. As much as I love getting mentions (@amytangerine), some of them get lost and I don't actually ever get to see the photos. If you're not set to private though, chances are really good that we will see a picture with the #amytangerine. We've been checking out the #amytangerine hashtag for a while now and are truly amazed by all that you share. So much creativity and goodness, we just had to put together a new weekly feature where we highlight some of our favorites. This week we spotted some awesome projects using our Embroidery Stencil kits.
